positive: Minimalist woodland creature silhouette on a vibrant, deep indigo background. The main subject is a leaping, stylized fox and a playful raccoon, rendered with bold, graphic lines and clean negative space. Composition should be centered and dynamic, evoking movement and joy. Use a limited color palette of burnt orange, creamy ivory, and forest teal. The style should be sophisticated vector art mixed with high-contrast etching, suitable for screen printing on fabric. Strong contrast and sharp edges are crucial for print quality. The scene should feel magical and nature-inspired.
negative: blur, noise, watermark, logo, text, signature, artifacts, deformed, badly drawn, messy, low detail, multiple limbs, bad anatomy, cartoonish, hyperrealism
